modelRouting.noCostPolicy: software-only no-cost; quality depends on local hardware and installed backends

profile.label: Apple Silicon Pro/Max
profile.textModelTier: quantized 14B-32B reasoning/copy models where memory allows
profile.imageModelTier: ComfyUI with Qwen-Image or lighter fallback depending on RAM
profile.notes: First-class target for MacBook Pro M3 Pro class machines.

text.label: Frontier local reasoning/copy tier
text.role: strategy, critique, long-form copy, persona simulation
text.notes: Use for strategist, critic, copywriter, and persona-simulation passes when RAM/VRAM allows.

text.label: Fast local operator tier
text.role: summaries, extraction, task routing, checklist generation
text.notes: Use for repeatable low-cost internal tasks so the strongest model is reserved for high-leverage thinking.

vision.label: Frontier local vision tier
vision.role: image understanding, social asset analysis, visual QA, screenshot/link creative context
vision.candidateTier: Qwen2.5-VL 7B/32B or comparable open-weight VLM depending on memory
vision.licensePosture: audit exact checkpoint license before client/commercial use
vision.notes: Default for MacBook Pro Apple Silicon class machines. Use it to inspect uploaded images before copy, carousel, and platform adaptation work.

vision.label: Fast local vision tier
vision.role: quick visual summaries, lightweight image triage, attachment routing
vision.candidateTier: small open-weight VLM for machines where 7B+ vision is too slow
vision.licensePosture: audit exact checkpoint license before client/commercial use
vision.notes: Fallback when the stronger VLM is not installed or the machine is too constrained.

image.label: Text-heavy social graphics tier
image.role: IG carousel covers, ad-like static visuals, quote cards
image.candidateTier: local workflow optimized for readable text and brand-safe compositions
image.licensePosture: audit exact image model and workflow licenses
image.notes: Prefer for carousels and graphics where legible text matters. Keep human approval before publishing.

image.label: General local image tier
image.role: mood boards, backgrounds, concept art, visual variants
image.candidateTier: memory-aware local diffusion or image model workflow
image.licensePosture: audit exact image model and workflow licenses
image.notes: Use for optional image ideation. If ComfyUI is missing, generate precise briefs instead of blocking the workspace.

orchestration.label: Local sequential agent batch
orchestration.candidateTier: single active model call at a time with cached context
orchestration.licensePosture: project code is no-cost; backend/model licenses audited separately
orchestration.notes: Best default for laptops. Agents run in sequence and persist outputs to files.

requiredHumanDecision: Download exact local model weights only after checking their license and hardware fit.
Do not configure paid API fallbacks in generated workspaces.
Keep image/video generation optional when hardware is too small.

recommendedVisionInstall.reason: best default balance for local image understanding on Apple Silicon Pro class hardware
